responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Execute P0 production cutover: deploy verified IVX fixes to production, build final Android APK, test live endpoints, and return complete proof with measured evidence.

## Constraints & Preferences
- Do not mark VERIFIED without live production evidence
- Do not claim 100M-user readiness тАФ scale limitations documented separately
- Never expose secret values
- Do not ask for credentials unless runtime test proves missing/expired/401/403
- Production APK uses `https://api.ivxholding.com` only, no debug banners, no Rork proxy
- P0 failures: zero allowed; P1 failures in changed release scope: zero allowed
- Pre-existing unrelated test failures must be listed separately, not hidden

## Progress
### Done
- **GitHub push completed**: Commit `e9740483788d74abd6b8dd2e892922eab68de95e` pushed to `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` via `sync-github.mjs`, message "P0 Release: Redesigned property video view + TTL feed cache for burst traffic performance", timestamp 2026-07-16T10:46:39Z
- **Backend deployed to Render**: Auto-deployed, now running commit `e9740483788d`, boot time `2026-07-16T10:48:28.921Z`, status `healthy`, 77 routes, AI enabled
- **Pre-deployment gate passed**:
  - TypeScript: 0 errors
  - Tests: 461 pass / 1 pre-existing fail (Playwright)
  - Expo build checks: Passed (static check, 0 errors)
  - Lint (app source): 1 pre-existing error (`expo-updates` import in `lib/ota-error-handler.ts` тАФ not release scope)
  - Backend smoke: All endpoints healthy
  - Landing build: `bun run build-landing.mjs` succeeded, output to `expo/ivxholding-landing/dist/`
  - Web export: `bunx expo export --platform web` succeeded, `dist/` generated
- **Post-deploy endpoint verification**:
  - `/health`: healthy, commit `e9740483788d`, AI provider `vercel_ai_gateway`, model `openai/gpt-4o`
  - `/readiness`: `ready: true`, status `ok`
  - `/version`: commit `e9740483788d`
  - Feed cache TTL confirmed: `X-IVX-Cache: MISS` тЖТ `HIT` on second request, `Cache-Control: public, max-age=30, stale-while-revalidate=60`
  - Home feed cache: Same TTL behavior confirmed
  - Landing page: 200, Casa Rosario present, canonical reel card present, 3 deals active
  - Chat frontend: 200 at `chat.ivxholding.com`
- **Live production QA completed**:
  - Owner AI: Authenticated as `iperez4242@gmail.com` via Supabase, sent message about Casa Rosario, received real AI response, `provider=chatgpt`, `model=openai/gpt-4o`, `assistantPersisted=True`, `selectedIntent=landing_inspection`, `fallbackUsed=False`
  - Deals API: HTTP 200, 5+ videos returned, Casa Rosario `id=casa-rosario-001`, `price=1400000`, `min_investment=50`
  - Invalid deal ID: 404 correctly returned
  - Protected route (no token): 401 correctly returned
  - Invalid password: `invalid_credentials` error correctly returned
  - Auth diagnostic: 200, Supabase URL confirmed, service role key present
  - Image upload (JSON format): OK=True, signed upload URL returned to `ivx-owner-files` bucket
  - PDF upload (JSON format): OK=True, signed upload URL returned
  - Messages persistence: 1000+ messages in `ivx_messages`, 1 conversation in `ivx_conversations`
  - Project videos: 10 videos in `project_videos`
  - Members: 4 members in `members` table
- **Deployment safety verified**:
  - No secret leakage in release diff
  - No destructive DB migration
  - Auth guard still works (401 without bearer)
  - Previous stable SHA: `21e7bb8057b85c05dbf60138803520f313ec6de2`
  - Rollback path: `git revert e974048` on origin/main тЖТ Render auto-deploys
- **Load test results (from prior phase, still valid for scale status)**:
  - BASELINE-10: 0% errors, p95=945ms тАФ PASS
  - BASELINE-50: 0% errors, p95=4826ms тАФ SAFETY STOP
  - PROGRESSIVE-500: 64.2% errors тАФ BREAKING POINT
  - TTL feed cache fix deployed and verified working with `X-IVX-Cache: HIT` headers

### In Progress
- **APK build running in background** (PID 7314, log at `/tmp/ivx_apk_build3.log`):
  - Version incremented to 1.4.5, versionCode 36, build marker `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_16_BUILD_36_PRODUCTION_RELEASE`
  - `expo prebuild --platform android --clean` completed successfully
  - First build failed: `expo-location` 15.1.1 incompatible with Expo SDK 54 (32 compilation errors)
  - Fix applied: Created `expo-modules.config.json` with `{"exclude": ["expo-location"]}`, removed `node_modules/expo-location`, cleared gradle cache
  - Second build: JS bundle completed (4154 modules, 38883ms), now in app packaging phase (mergeReleaseResources, processReleaseManifest, desugarReleaseFileDependencies)
  - Build still running тАФ no BUILD SUCCESSFUL or BUILD FAILED yet

### Blocked
- **Real device QA**: Cannot install APK on physical Android device from sandbox тАФ requires owner to install and run 30-item checklist
- **Render plan is free**: `render.yaml` specifies standard with autoscaling but actual deployment is single free instance, no autoscaling
- **Redis not active**: `render.yaml` specifies Redis but enterprise health reports `redis: false`
- **RENDER_SERVICE_ID in .env is placeholder**: `srv-abc123` тАФ not the real service ID, so Render API direct calls fail
- **APK build may time out**: Gradle build takes ~4+ minutes, sandbox 60s timeout per command requires background execution

## Key Decisions
- Used `sync-github.mjs` script for GitHub push (Rork git router syncs automatically but sync script provides atomic commit via Git Tree API)
- Excluded `expo-location` from autolinking via `expo-modules.config.json` тАФ app doesn't use location services, module incompatible with SDK 54
- Used JSON body format for attachment upload tests (not multipart) тАФ backend `owner-multimodal.ts` expects `fileName`/`mimeType`/`sizeBytes` fields, returns signed Supabase upload URL
- Authenticated via Supabase REST API (`/auth/v1/token?grant_type=password`) to get valid access token for protected endpoint testing
- Kept 30s TTL cache window тАФ balances freshness with Supabase load reduction
- Per-instance in-memory cache chosen over Redis because Redis is not deployed
- Previous canonical reel card migration, console.log cleanup, and dead code removal all included in deployed commit

## Next Steps
1. Wait for APK build to complete тАФ check `/tmp/ivx_apk_build3.log` for `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`
2. If APK succeeds: verify APK file exists at `expo/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk`, compute checksum, record file size
3. If APK fails: investigate build error, fix, rebuild
4. Commit version increment (`app.config.ts` to v1.4.5/versionCode 36) and `expo-modules.config.json` to git, push to GitHub
5. Owner must install final APK on real Android device and complete 30-item QA checklist (Phase 7)
6. Compile mandatory final report with all evidence in exact template format
7. Upgrade Render plan from free to standard for autoscaling (separate from this release)
8. Deploy Redis on Render for multi-instance Socket.IO adapter (separate from this release)

## Critical Context
- **Repository**: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`, branch: `main`
- **Release SHA**: `e9740483788d74abd6b8dd2e892922eab68de95e` (pushed to GitHub, deployed to Render)
- **Previous stable SHA**: `21e7bb8057b85c05dbf60138803520f313ec6de2`
- **Backend health**: `https://api.ivxholding.com/health` тЖТ commit `e9740483788d`, boot `2026-07-16T10:48:28.921Z`, AI enabled
- **Supabase project**: `kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb`, URL: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`
- **Owner email**: `iperez4242@gmail.com` (authenticated successfully, session token extracted to `/tmp/ivx_access_token`)
- **Credentials in `android-ivx-holdings/.env`**: Contains GITHUB_TOKEN (ghp_, 40 chars), RENDER_API_KEY (rnd_, 32 chars), IVX_OWNER_TOKEN (IVX_, 83 chars), Supabase URL/anon key, owner email/password тАФ all extracted to `/tmp/ivx_*` files for runtime use
- **RENDER_SERVICE_ID in .env**: `srv-abc123` (placeholder, not real тАФ Render API direct deploy fails with "not found")
- **Backend self-deploy endpoint**: `/api/ivx/developer-deploy/action` requires Supabase session bearer + `confirmText: "CONFIRM_IVX_RENDER_DEPLOY"` тАФ but fails because `RENDER_API_KEY` not loaded in runtime env
- **Render auto-deploy**: Triggered by git push to origin (Rork git router) тАФ confirmed working, deployed `e9740483788d` automatically
- **APK version**: 1.4.5, versionCode 36, build marker `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_16_BUILD_36_PRODUCTION_RELEASE`
- **Android SDK**: `/opt/android-sdk`, NDK: `27.1.12297006`, Java: `/usr/lib/jvm/jdk-17.0.13+11`
- **Expo SDK**: `~54.0.35`, React Native: `0.81.5`, Expo Router: `~6.0.24`
- **Gradle**: 8.14.3, buildTools 36.0.0, minSdk 24, compileSdk 36, targetSdk 36
- **expo-location**: v15.1.1, incompatible with SDK 54, excluded via `expo-modules.config.json`
- **Live data**: Casa Rosario `casa-rosario-001` (price $1.4M, min $50, ROI 30%), 10 project videos, 4 members, 1000+ messages
- **Scale status**: Verified 10cc (p95<1s), breaking point 500cc (64.2% errors), Render free plan, Redis not active, 100M NOT VERIFIED
- **Feed cache**: TTL 30s, max 100 entries, thundering-herd protection via per-key locks, `X-IVX-Cache: HIT/MISS` header, `Cache-Control: public, max-age=30, stale-while-revalidate=60`

## Relevant Files
- `backend/api/ivx-video-platform.ts` тАФ DEPLOYED: TTL response cache (CacheEntry, FEED_CACHE, withFeedCache), handles both `/feed` and `/home-feed` endpoints
- `expo/app.config.ts` тАФ MODIFIED
